expectations.text: DashboardLayout이 folder 기반 index.tsx 패턴으로 정리된다
expectations.evidence: index.tsx exists at components/dashboard/dashboardLayout/index.tsx with DashboardLayout component

expectations.text: flat components/DashboardLayout.tsx가 그대로 남지 않는다 (re-export pointing to folder version is acceptable)
expectations.evidence: DashboardLayout.tsx contains only a re-export: 'export { default, type DashboardLayoutProps } from "./dashboard/dashboardLayout"'. Original monolithic code was replaced.
Sidebar.tsx has <aside> with data-testid='dashboard-sidebar', uses navLinks from shared file
<main> element in index.tsx at line 32-36 with data-testid='dashboard-main' rendering {children}
DashboardLayoutProps includes children: ReactNode, rendered inside <main>

expectations.text: responsive breakpoint class가 유지되거나 개선된다 (md:, lg: 등)
expectations.evidence: Sidebar: 'hidden md:flex md:w-60 lg:w-64'; MobileNav: 'md:hidden'; main: 'md:px-6 md:pb-6 lg:px-8'

expectations.text: 사용처 import가 새 경로에 맞게 정리된다
expectations.evidence: Summary confirms DashboardLayout.tsx converted to re-export pointing to folder version for backward compatibility

expectations.text: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: No such imports or calls in any of the component files (index.tsx, Header.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, MobileNav.tsx, navLinks.tsx)
